creator: oberman@es.net
text:
The porters handbook does not call for sending diffs, but it really 
makes sense for
small changes like this.

Here are the 3 diff. Three lines changed, 1 deleted, 1 added, and 1 
modified:
 > diff -u mwavem.orig.shar mwavem.shar
--- mwavem.orig.shar    Mon Jul 23 07:57:48 2001
+++ mwavem.shar    Sun Jul 22 14:39:13 2001
@@ -40,7 +40,6 @@
 X            $0 start
 X            ;;
 X    stop  )
-X        killall ${MWAVE_NAME}
 X            ;;
 X    start )
 X            echo -n ' modem'
@@ -60,8 +59,9 @@
 X
 XPORTNAME=    mwavem-fbsd
 XPORTVERSION=    1.1
+XPORTREVISION=    1
 XCATEGORIES=    comms
-XMASTER_SITES=    http://www.escape.com/developer/~simonw/ \
+XMASTER_SITES=    http://www.escape.com/~simonw/ \
 X        ${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
 XEXTRACT_SUFX=    .tgz
 X
